meaning: n.[植]番泻树,晒干的番泻叶(可制取轻泻剂)
examples: Senna says he is not out to maim, just disrupt a game.
Senna was the last Formula One driver to have died on the track.
In one clip, Senna is shown sculpting earplugs into a precise shape prior to a race.
Perhaps what Senna inspires within those who admire him is not measurable in numbers.
Apart from his three championships, Senna earned more pole positions than any F1 driver before him.
